name: The Adventures of Kid Danger
overview: Henry Hart is a regular kid in the eighth grade who has a not-so-regular, part-time gig as Kid Danger. Kid Danger and his sidekick-in-training Captain Man embark on new adventures as they battle bizarre criminals and super villains.

trailers.title: 'The Adventures of Kid Danger' Official SUPER 😎 Trailer! ft. Jace Norman and Cooper Barnes | Nick
